title: July 24th, 2022
body:
#07/18 2022 - 07/24 2022

lyrics

i hate that the word for palindrome isn't at all

ditto for onomatopoeia

i'm not a purist but it sure is nice when



i don't wanna write when i listen

the music starts moving me it's time to get in

and see what it is

to be

with it

to be entirely honest

i see a down beat and wanna be with it

not just on it

so i give it whatever i have gathered

honored to be a backpacker

stretching the zipper

what i have to offer

didn't fit in the pocket

so i packed it up while i was walking

and never stopped hopping long to look backwards

i skip often

slip awkwardly

trip a trap an kick off it

willy wonka beats

i'm a slick talker, sick hawker

rip off the wrappin rabid. huntin

golden ticket or is it trick chocolate huh

i'm holding court with an act so exquisite you don't know if you get it

huh

still hoping i trick it off



https://open.spotify.com/

agenda

yes [day](day) with [noble](noble)
(08:39 am - 10:09 pm)

https://www.google.com/calendar/event?eid=ajlmdgu2b2f1azg5nhjyzmvhy2jhmxrtztggym1vcmvubzu0qg0

possibilities

scratch paper

queries/todos

queries/tweets in progress

todone



#twitter feed

magrus (magrus03):
the fact humanity went from revered female shamans doing sex work to heal the defenders of their communities of toxic energy to enslaved women forced to debase themselves with sex work offends us. we'll be tackling this soon
-kali and the galactic time council

https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1550898340178673665

nick redmark (9/100 διάλογος) (nickredmark):
let's do the recursive *and* transitive closure of helping each other. https://t.co/ecej2t06q9

https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1550855335656800256

ø28 (andrewmurphie):
everything is constantly differentiating/partially, differently integrating, infra to other aspects of ecological multiplicity. ongoing. it's perhaps only when we get this that we get ecology. when it's increasingly urgent that we attune our own differentiations within this

https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1550840166150963201

ø28 (andrewmurphie):
this is "ecological multiplicity". it's not only a multiplicity of units of ecology however. neither would it be a unity of such units, or anything else. it's alive, dynamic

https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1550839769420152838

ø28 (andrewmurphie):
the "three ecologies": social, mental or whatever (argument over that one) and environmental. although they're all both actual & virtual, which makes six. could as easily be the human, the nonhuman and the nonliving across all that, which makes 18. from there, infinite ecologies

https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1550838977086853120

ø28 (andrewmurphie):
this is why we need the arts and humanities, philosophy and the speculative end of the social sciences. they all think-feel this the best. as so many other things

https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1550838086233460736

ø28 (andrewmurphie):
i love this. it's pretty (non) fundamental to how i think. and sometimes wonder if whitehead's personal and social orders (a radical notions of time, space and measure and so forth) don't go a lot further in some ways. https://t.co/vtuvsuse1i

https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1550830344089309184

ø28 (andrewmurphie):
only slowly being learnt if at all: it's not only "nature" that thinks/communicated/lives/functions differently to major western individualist notions; neither does the social. actually, neither do individuations. there are no individuals. some major "differends" in there

https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1550827616264982529

mrs c 🪷 (captain_mrs):
my dad gave up trying to teach me to ride a bike when i was a kid because i wasn't getting it and then i never learned

this was a problem with *his* patience with learning, not me

https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1550771183078998017
